betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Nuclear Furnace: Smelting with Power§f

§aThe Nuclear Furnace is a powered furnace that uses FE instead of fuel.§f
The §bNuclear Furnace§f (`nuclearcraft:nuclear_furnace`) is NuclearCraft's §belectric furnace§f. It accepts Forge Energy (FE) on one face and processes smelting recipes without burning coal or other fuel. The Nuclear Furnace is the §b§f§cfirst machine in the NC tech line§f§f that introduces the concept of §bFE-powered processing§f.

§6Crafting Recipe (graph: minecraft.crafting)§f:
Per the JEI graph, the Nuclear Furnace recipe requires:
- §bTough Alloy Ingot§f (`nuclearcraft:alloy:1`) — NC's mid-game alloy
- §bFurnace§f (`minecraft:furnace`) — vanilla furnace as a chassis

§6Function§f:
- §bProcess: smelting§f — smelts any vanilla or modded smelting recipe.
- §bPower: FE only§f — no fuel slot, no burn time. FE consumption per smelt scales with the recipe.
- §bSpeed: default§f — same as a vanilla furnace unless §bSpeed Upgrades§f are inserted into its UI.
- §bEnergy Upgrades§f can be inserted to reduce FE consumption per smelt.

§6Where to Use It§f:
- Smelt §bTough Alloy Ingot§f recipes at scale (faster than vanilla furnaces)
- Process §b§f§ciron§f§f, §b§f§ccopper§f§f, and other metals without burning fuel
- A prerequisite for the §bAlloy Furnace§f (which builds on the Nuclear Furnace chassis)
- Inserted as a chassis for §bME Controller§f in §bAE2§f sub-networks

§6Upgrade Slots§f:
- §bSpeed Upgrade§f (`nuclearcraft:upgrade:0`): reduces processing time per recipe.
- §bEnergy Upgrade§f (`nuclearcraft:upgrade:1`): reduces FE consumption per recipe.
- Up to 8 upgrades per machine (configurable per machine type).

§6Component Supply Chain§f:
- §bTough Alloy Ingot§f → from §bAlloy Furnace§f using §bTough Alloy Dust§f blends (Tough Alloy = Iron + Coal + Limestone flux in NC's basic alloy furnace)
- §bFurnace§f → 8 × Cobblestone in a vanilla crafting grid

§eTip§f: The Nuclear Furnace is your first §bFE-only machine§f — pair it with a §bVoltaic Pile§f to keep it running during a power grid brownout. Add §bSpeed Upgrades§f to scale smelting throughput as your §bFE generation§f grows.
